content.text:
I mean... mostly. Yeah. I think. 

Last month was -- okay, last month was also supposed to settle down and it didn't, but that was because of the restructure. And before that there was the product launch. But those were specific things, those weren't -- 

*[pause]*

I mean it's been kind of a long time since it actually settled down, if I'm being honest. But that's just -- that's the nature of the job right now. It's a growth phase.
